entries.description: Re-verified the 3-layer verificationVerdict-drop diagnosis against current code (close_session.py:1621 omits arg; Disposition has no verdict field; parse_verification_response already emits the canonical token; --no-router records null). Confirmed PyPI-only (TS reads/derives only).
Wrote proposal.md with 10 dispositions; ran cross-provider design consensus.

Synthesized verdict.md (3 objections accepted + 1 partial): verdict domain collapsed to VERIFIED/ISSUES_FOUND/null; explicit-wins-under-force precedence; R4 re-close invariant. Locked spec scope block.
Authored ai-assignment.md via routed analysis (S2=Sonnet-tier, S3=Haiku-tier).
Cross-provider verification of the locked design (gemini-pro) = VERIFIED, 0 issues across all 4 checks.

Implemented verificationVerdict persistence: disposition.py Disposition.verification_verdict field (omit-null, CANONICAL_VERDICTS); close_session.py resolve_close_verdict() (explicit-wins->api-derived->null), threaded to _flip_state_to_closed + closeout_succeeded + verification_completed (dropped hardcoded manual_attestation); disposition.schema.json updated; 31 new tests + 1060 full suite green
